title: Er'kit (disambiguation)
content:
'''Er'kit''' is a misspelling of either of the following:

*[[Er'Kit/Legends|'''Er'Kit''']], an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]]
*The [[Er'Kit (species)/Legends|'''Er'kit''']], a [[Species/Legends|species]] native to the planet Er'Kit

{{Disambig}}
